# Auto-generated latest requirements - Compatible with Nautobot 3.x

# Pin GraphQL dependencies to avoid version conflicts
# Nautobot 3.0.2 requires graphene-django<3.3.0,>=3.2.3
# which requires: graphene<4,>=3.0; graphql-relay<4,>=3.1.1
# Pin to minimum versions that include resolve_maybe_thunk (3.2.0+)
graphene>=3.0,<4.0
graphql-relay>=3.2.0,<4.0

# Plugins
wingpy==1.6.0
nautobot-plugin-nornir==3.0.0
nautobot-device-lifecycle-mgmt==4.0.0
# NOTE: changed from [all] because it includes slurpit-sdk==0.9.100 (httpx<0.28),
# which conflicts with wingpy (httpx>=0.28.1). This is a workaround to avoid the conflict.  
nautobot-ssot[aci,aristacv,bootstrap,citrix-adm,device42,dna-center,infoblox,ipfabric,meraki,nautobot-device-lifecycle-mgmt,pysnow,servicenow]==4.0.0

# Install chatops with all integrations except grafana (grafana conflicts with diffsync requirements)
